calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Richard Alley for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of plaintiff in correspondence dated 3/24/2003. Proceedings reported by: Sara Leschen, CSR #6213. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2002 Continued To Mar-27-03 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Richard L. Alley, appearing in Propria Persona via telephone conference.
After hearing, Order to Show Cause issued to plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file proof of service, obtain an answer from or enter default against defendant(s) is ordered re-set to 3/27/2003 at 10:30 AM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond. (212)
